changelog: Environment scorer cold start cap aligned: COLD_START_BAR_CAP reduced from 6 to 2 bars — fitness now reaches full score in ~10 min instead of 30 min
Dashboard now shows ML-blended confidence in market box (not raw rules %): extracted from gate signal_confidence.value.confidence
Added rules_confidence and threshold_delta to snapshot signal dict for transparency
OHLC bootstrap now cache-first split: cached markets load in parallel, REST-needed markets stagger 22s apart to avoid bursting 3/min cap
Nasdaq (IX.D.NASDAQ.IFM.IP / NQ=F) added to EPIC_YAHOO_MAP and DEFAULT_SEED_EPICS for automatic OHLC pre-population
Startup OHLC pre-seed: missing Yahoo-mapped caches now auto-populated before REST bootstrap on every launch
Agent startup now kills stale agent processes and removes stale lock file before acquiring a new lock
Startup self-test added: test_deployed_fixes.py regression suite runs during bootstrap (self_test phase)
Startup tracker gains self_test phase (55%) in splash screen checklist
Test suite updated: session_manager and trade_eligibility tests use COLD_START_BARS constant instead of hardcoded 6
Regression tests expanded: 10 new tests in test_deployed_fixes.py covering all Session 3 fixes (30 total)
